# Soft25 Async12 Reserved6k Contract

## Soft 25
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.25 with quality bias floor 0.23 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Async 12
async pre-rot and swarm micro pressure default to 0.12 so reclaim starts earlier

## Reserved 6k
reserved context for hard blocking defaults to 6k for denser long-horizon reclaim

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/status/usage vitest
